title: SyncedAdvancements
description: a fabric mod i put together in 30 minutes just to sync advancements between players
body:
##  SyncedAdvancements: a Fabric mod that seamlessly syncs advancements between players on a server. 

SyncedAdvancements is a Fabric mod that allows players on a server to share their advancements with each other in real-time. When one player earns an advancement, all other players on the server will automatically receive it too. And when someone joins the server, their advancements will be synced with all other players, ensuring that everyone is on the same page.

if you have a close friend or a friend group you would like to enjoy Minecraft together with but with a more connected experience, you should try it out!

# Features:

- ### It works
- ### This mod does not require any dependencies
- ### Lightweight
- ### Yes, it should also work with any custom advancements made with datapacks or mods
